descriptions.building_area_sqft: Total calculated building area in square feet.
descriptions.building_file: File path to the existing building geometry (if any).
descriptions.door_corner_margin_ft: Minimum distance a door must be placed from an internal corner.
descriptions.front_setback_ft: Minimum front property line setback in feet.
descriptions.geometry_file: File path to the raw lot geometry.
descriptions.max_far: Maximum Floor Area Ratio (FAR) allowed before purchasing bonus density.
descriptions.max_height_ft: Maximum allowed building height in feet.
descriptions.max_impervious_surface_pct: Maximum allowed percentage of impervious surfaces on the lot.
descriptions.max_lot_coverage_fraction: Maximum allowed fraction of the lot that can be covered by the building footprint.
descriptions.max_vehicle_parking_spaces_per_unit: Maximum vehicle parking spaces per unit (TMP cap).
descriptions.min_area_fraction_of_max: Minimum percentage of the maximum allowed footprint that must be built.
descriptions.min_bicycle_parking_spaces_per_unit: Minimum bicycle parking spaces per unit (Transit-oriented design).
descriptions.min_house_depth_ft: Minimum allowed depth of the main building structure.
descriptions.min_house_width_ft: Minimum allowed width of the main building structure.
descriptions.parcel_area_sqft: Total area of the property parcel in square feet.
descriptions.rear_setback_ft: Minimum rear property line setback in feet.
descriptions.side_setback_ft: Minimum side property line setback in feet.
descriptions.tree_protection_zone: GeoJSON boundaries for protected trees that cannot be built over.

adjacency_rules.description: Bathroom must be ensuite to the bedroom sharing at least 4ft of wall.
Bathroom must not share a wall with the kitchen.
Bathrooms must not share a wall with each other.
Kitchen should not share a wall with a bedroom.
Bedroom to Bathroom must be < 25 ft.

area_rules.description: Bathroom must be smaller than the bedroom it serves.
